title: OSCORE protect rejects plaintexts that exactly fill the buffer
description: The plaintext bounds checks use >= instead of > before copying options or payload. Trigger: a request/response whose code+options exactly fills CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX, or whose code+options+marker+payload exactly fills it. Bad behavior: valid maximum-size inputs are rejected with OSCORE_ERR_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL even though the copy would fit exactly, causing an avoidable interop/MTU failure at the configured boundary. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:1152-1168 and :1476-1492.
